video_prompt: Aerial shot of Seetha Amman Kovil temple complex, lush green surroundings, misty morning sunlight casting golden hues across the landscape, camera pans slowly towards the temple's intricately designed spires.
audio_narration: "Welcome to Seetha Amman Kovil, a sacred site in Sri Lanka's Nuwara Eliya district."

video_prompt: Medium shot of a priest or devotee narrating the story of Sita's captivity, surrounded by intricate stone carvings depicting scenes from the Ramayana epic, warm sunlight illuminates the temple walls.
audio_narration: "Legend has it that Sita was held captive here by Ravana, King of Lanka, in this very forest."

video_prompt: Close-up shot of the Ashoka Vatika's stunning stone gateway, ornate carvings of mythical creatures and foliage adorn the structure, filtered natural light accentuates the intricate details.
audio_narration: "The Ashoka Vatika, a lush forest garden, was said to be Sita's prison and Ravana's pleasure ground."

video_prompt: Low-angle shot of devotees offering prayers and flowers at the temple's entrance, vibrant colors of traditional attire, intricate patterns on the temple walls.
audio_narration: "Seetha Amman Kovil is a symbol of devotion and faith for millions of Hindus around the world."

video_prompt: Macro shot of the circular indentations on the rocks by the river bank, believed to be Hanuman's footprints, water flows gently in the background.
audio_narration: "These ancient rocks bear witness to the mythological legend of Hanuman, Sita's loyal companion."

video_prompt: Wide shot of visitors from diverse backgrounds walking towards the temple complex, vibrant colors of clothing and flowers fill the frame.
audio_narration: "Today, pilgrims from across the globe flock to Seetha Amman Kovil, seeking blessings and spiritual rejuvenation."

video_prompt: Panoramic shot of the temple complex at sunset, warm golden light casting long shadows, devotees in the distance offering prayers, a sense of serenity envelops the scene.
audio_narration: "As the sun sets over Seetha Amman Kovil, the sacred energies emanating from this site inspire hope and devotion within all who visit."
